data.name: 妹妹旅行
data.detailed_description:
A Dungeon Crawling-Choose Your Adventure-type RPG is here!

A heart-pounding thrill ride that you’ll never forget!

Treasures are hidden away inside ancient ruins.

Nail-biting battles against monsters.

Yearning for a land unseen.

An adventurer. And his sister-like companions.

Enjoy this adventure filled with romance and epic fight scenes!

Experience this masterful blend of action and romance brought to you in native English!

Features

    • A Dungeon-Crawling-Choose Your Own Adventure-type RPG

    • An Elaborate, Hand-drawn World Map

    • A Large Ensemble Cast of Characters

    • Tons of Fight Scenes

data.short_description: It has begun! The story of an adventurer and his sister-like companions. Brought to you by Kagura Games and Inusuku. Sister Travel is here!

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: 1280x768 or better Display. Lag may occur from loading menus or maps. Turn off other programs before running the game.
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10
  • 處理器: 2+ GHz Processor
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL ES 2.0 hardware driver support required for WebGL acceleration. (AMD Catalyst 10.9, nVidia 358.50)
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: 1280x768 or better Display. Lag may occur from loading menus or maps. Turn off other programs before running the game.

data.legal_notice: © Kagura Games and Inusuku, All Rights Reserved.
